title: Repositories
subtitle: Connect GitHub repositories to analyze commits and generate messages.

connected.title: Connected
connected.subtitle: Repositories available to the commit analyzer.
connected.emptyHelper: Connect one from the list below to get started.

github.title: Your GitHub repositories
github.subtitle: Pick a repository to connect.
github.empty: No repositories found on your GitHub account

disconnectDialog.title: Disconnect repository?
disconnectDialog.description: This will remove {name} from Commit Analyzer. You can reconnect it at any time.

purgeDialog.title: Delete {name}'s data?
purgeDialog.description: This permanently deletes all commits, file stats, and analytics we've collected for {name}, then disconnects the repository. This cannot be undone. You can reconnect later, but the data will be re-ingested from scratch.

error.load: We couldn't load your repositories. Please try again.
